title: Cabin Mod
description: An oasis of love and friendship.
body:
## Cabin Mod is a love letter to long lasting friendship, excitement, and fun. Many unique characters and friends can be made along the way, with powerful tools, custom textures, and an unbreakable bond of companionship.

### Cabin Mod adds a variety of new cabin themed decoration, tools and unique progression for a fantastic player experience.

### Cabin Mod is still under major development, so keep your eyes peeled for the next updates!


```
Created by staticimage with art and design help from orbiez_

Additional credits:
- michael: paintings and likeness
- tamblyn: likeness and promotion
- matthew: likeness
- melvin: moral support
- calvin: cabin
```
